name: football-prediction-platform
description: Open-source football intelligence platform for realtime ingestion, prediction, odds comparison, simulation, and post-match calibration.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w services/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.dev:demo: concurrently "npm run dev:demo -w services/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w services/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w services/api && npm run test:ai
